induced_prompt_raw: Create a sentence with a chain of nested clauses where each subject performs an action on the object introduced by the previous clause, maintaining a consistent grammatical structure and avoiding redundant or illogical verb sequences.
induced_prompt: Create a sentence with a chain of nested clauses where each subject performs an action on the object introduced by the previous clause, maintaining a consistent grammatical structure and avoiding redundant or illogical verb sequences.
l2_raw: {"sentences": ["The boy who found the book that had been hidden in the drawer opened it to reveal a letter that was addressed to his father.", "The father who received the letter that had been written by his sister read it to discover a message that described a map hidden in the attic.", "The sister who had drawn the map that was tucked inside the letter showed it to her brother to explain the location of a box buried beneath the old oak tree.", "The brother who dug at the spot where the map indicated found the box that contained a key to a chest stored in the basement.", "The caretaker who unlocked the chest that had been sealed for decades retrieved the document that confirmed the inheritance of the estate."]}
l2_sentences: The boy who found the book that had been hidden in the drawer opened it to reveal a letter that was addressed to his father.
The father who received the letter that had been written by his sister read it to discover a message that described a map hidden in the attic.
The sister who had drawn the map that was tucked inside the letter showed it to her brother to explain the location of a box buried beneath the old oak tree.
The brother who dug at the spot where the map indicated found the box that contained a key to a chest stored in the basement.
The caretaker who unlocked the chest that had been sealed for decades retrieved the document that confirmed the inheritance of the estate.
